dashboard.label: DSA, Data Source Assessment
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"DSA, Data Source Assessment","description":"Audit and analysis support to structure a customer assessment around visible telemetry, quick wins, and the collection plan.","inputs":{"input_time":{"type":"input.timerange","title":"Assessment window","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-30d@d,now"}},"input_limit":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Table depth","options":{"token":"result_limit","defaultValue":"20","items":[{"label":"10 rows","value":"10"},{"label":"20 rows","value":"20"},{"label":"50 rows","value":"50"}]}}},"defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":false,"showLastUpdated":false}}},"dataSources":{"dsKpiInventory":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=inventory | stats first(technique_count) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsKpiActivable":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=potential | stats first(technique_count) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsKpiBlocked":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=gaps | stats first(technique_count) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsKpiMissingSources":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=gaps limit=500 | stats dc(data_source_name) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsKpiImmediateDetections":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=potential | rex field=reason "(?<activables>\d+) detections are immediately activable and (?<adjacents>\d+) are adjacent candidates" | stats first(activables) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsKpiAdjacentCandidates":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=potential | rex field=reason "(?<activables>\d+) detections are immediately activable and (?<adjacents>\d+) are adjacent candidates" | stats first(adjacents) as value","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsAssessmentFrame":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | search status=potential | rex field=reason "(?<activables>\d+) detections are immediately activable and (?<adjacents>\d+) are adjacent candidates" | eval Version=if(es_installed="true", "DSA with ES visibility", "DSA++ classic, degraded mode") | eval Reading=if(es_installed="true", "Active coverage + assessment", "Assessment remains useful even without ES") | rename search_window as Window | eval Value lever=if(es_installed="true", "Prioritize activation and collection", "With the data already present, ES would enable " . activables . " detections by simple activation and open " . adjacents . " adjacent candidates.") | table Version Reading Window Value lever","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsExecutiveStory":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | rex field=reason "(?<activables>\d+) detections are immediately activable and (?<adjacents>\d+) are adjacent candidates" | eval priority=case(status="potential","P1",status="gaps","P1",status="inventory","P2",status="current_unavailable","P1",true(),"P3") | eval area=case(status="inventory","Finding",status="potential","Value lever ES",status="gaps","Collection",status="current_unavailable","Report version",true(),status) | eval message=case(status="inventory", technique_count . " mapped data sources observed during the selected period.",status="potential", activables . " detections would be activable in ES by simple activation with the telemetry already present.",status="gaps", technique_count . " techniques remain constrained by collection gaps.",status="current_unavailable", "ES is not detected, so the report falls back to DSA++ classic mode to remain usable.",true(), reason) | eval implication=case(status="inventory", "The observation perimeter is sufficient for a concrete assessment.",status="potential", "The report directly supports ES value selling from the current state.",status="gaps", "The next value step depends on a prioritized onboarding plan.",status="current_unavailable", "The degraded reading remains useful in pre-sales, partner, and consulting contexts.",true(), recommendation) | eval next_step=case(status="inventory", "Validate the quality and representativeness of observed sources.",status="potential", "Show the customer what ES would unlock by simple activation with their current data.",status="gaps", "Turn missing sources into a collection and TA backlog.",status="current_unavailable", "Treat the degraded version as DSA++ classic mode, not as a report limitation.",true(), recommendation) | table priority area message implication next_step","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsTopActivations":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=potential limit=60 include_partial=true | eval priority=case(match_ratio>=1 AND technique_count>=5,"P1",match_ratio>=1 OR technique_count>=4,"P2",true(),"P3") | eval action=case(match_ratio>=1,"Test quickly",match_ratio>=0.5,"Complete the source",true(),"Validate logs") | rename family as family | rename detection_name as use_case | rename data_source_name as source | rename technique_count as techniques | sort 0 priority - techniques use_case | head 8 | table priority use_case family source techniques action","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsTopGaps":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=gaps limit=200 | eval priority=case(technique_count>=20 OR detection_count>=100,"P1",technique_count>=10 OR detection_count>=25,"P2",true(),"P3") | eval action="Qualify then onboard" | rename family as family | rename data_source_name as source | rename detection_count as detections | rename technique_count as techniques | rename supported_ta_names as TA | sort 0 priority - techniques - detections source | head 8 | table priority source family techniques detections TA action","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsAuditFindings":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=summary | rex field=reason "(?<activables>\d+) detections are immediately activable and (?<adjacents>\d+) are adjacent candidates" | eval area=case(status="inventory","Audit finding",status="potential","ES value",status="gaps","Collection plan",status="current_unavailable","Degraded mode",true(),status) | eval finding=case(status="inventory", technique_count . " mapped data sources were observed in the selected window.",status="potential", activables . " detections would be activable in ES by simple activation with the current telemetry.",status="gaps", technique_count . " techniques remain limited by collection gaps.",status="current_unavailable", "Without ES detected, the report remains usable in DSA++ classic mode.",true(), reason) | eval action=case(status="inventory", "Validate the quality and representativeness of observed sources.",status="potential", "Use this finding as an ES value argument based on already present data.",status="gaps", "Turn missing sources into an onboarding and TA backlog.",status="current_unavailable", "Treat the degraded version as a standard assessment report, not as an error.",true(), recommendation) | rename technique_count as techniques | table area techniques finding action","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsPotentialByFamily":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=potential limit=200 include_partial=true | stats count as detections by family | sort - detections","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsGapsByFamily":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=gaps limit=200 | stats sum(detection_count) as detections by family | sort - detections","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsPotentialTable":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=potential limit=$result_limit$ include_partial=true | eval priority=case(match_ratio>=1 AND technique_count>=5,"P1",match_ratio>=1 OR technique_count>=4,"P2",true(),"P3") | eval coverage=if(required_data_source_count>0, matched_data_source_count . "/" . required_data_source_count, "") | eval action=case(match_ratio>=1,"Test quickly",match_ratio>=0.5,"Complete the source",true(),"Validate logs") | rename family as family | rename detection_name as use_case | rename data_source_name as source | rename technique_count as techniques | sort 0 priority - techniques use_case | table priority family use_case source techniques coverage action","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsGapTable":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"| attackcoverageadvisor mode=gaps limit=$result_limit$ | eval priority=case(technique_count>=20 OR detection_count>=100,"P1",technique_count>=10 OR detection_count>=25,"P2",true(),"P3") | eval action="Qualify then onboard" | rename family as family | rename data_source_name as source | rename detection_count as detections | rename technique_count as techniques | rename supported_ta_names as TA | sort 0 priority - techniques - detections source | table priority family source detections techniques TA action","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsDailyIngest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval gb=round(bytes/pow(1024,3),2) | table _time gb | sort _time","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestAvg":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval mb=bytes/pow(1024,2) | stats avg(mb) as value | eval value=round(value,1)","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestMedian":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval mb=bytes/pow(1024,2) | stats median(mb) as value | eval value=round(value,1)","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestP95":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval mb=bytes/pow(1024,2) | stats p95(mb) as value | eval value=round(value,1)","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestPeak":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval mb=bytes/pow(1024,2) | stats max(mb) as value | eval value=round(value,1)","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestStats":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval gb=bytes/pow(1024,3) | sort 0 _time | eventstats count as jours avg(gb) as moyenne median(gb) as mediane p95(gb) as p95 max(gb) as pic min(gb) as minimum stdev(gb) as ecart_type first(gb) as premier last(gb) as dernier | eval coeff_variation_pct=if(moyenne>0, round((ecart_type/moyenne)*100,1), 0) | eval tendance_pct=if(premier>0, round(((dernier-premier)/premier)*100,1), null()) | eval stabilite=case(coeff_variation_pct<15,"Stable",coeff_variation_pct<35,"Modérée",true(),"Variable") | eval tendance=case(isnull(tendance_pct),"N/A",tendance_pct>=15,"Hausse",tendance_pct<=-15,"Baisse",true(),"Stable") | stats first(jours) as jours first(moyenne) as moyenne first(mediane) as mediane first(p95) as p95 first(pic) as pic first(minimum) as minimum first(ecart_type) as ecart_type first(coeff_variation_pct) as cv_pct first(tendance) as tendance first(tendance_pct) as trend_pct | eval moyenne=round(moyenne,2) | eval mediane=round(mediane,2) | eval p95=round(p95,2) | eval pic=round(pic,2) | eval minimum=round(minimum,2) | eval ecart_type=round(ecart_type,2) | table jours moyenne mediane p95 pic minimum ecart_type cv_pct tendance trend_pct","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}},"dsIngestPeakDays":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage earliest=$global_time.earliest$ latest=$global_time.latest$ | bin _time span=1d | stats sum(b) as bytes by _time | eval ingest_gb_j=round(bytes/pow(1024,3),2) | eval jour=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d") | sort 0 - ingest_gb_j | head 10 | table jour ingest_gb_j","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"bg":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#08111F","strokeColor":"transparent"}},"heroStrip":{"type":"splunk.rectangle","options":{"fillColor":"#14B8A6","strokeColor":"transparent"}},"hero":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"# **DSA, Data Source Assessment**
### Read the current state, project ES value, and prioritize collection even without ES detected","fontColor":"#FFFFFF","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"heroNote":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Usage**: customer audit, partner workshop, collection consulting, SE qualification. Without ES, the report remains a sales lever.","fontColor":"#BFDBFE","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"dsaDefinition":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### What this dashboard must do
- Establish a finding on visible telemetry
- Highlight short-term activable value
- Turn missing telemetry into a collection plan
- Remain useful without ES through a DSA++ classic sales-oriented mode","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","backgroundColor":"#0F1728"}},"dsaPrinciples":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### Reading principles
1. **Observe** what really comes through
2. **Qualify** what can be activated quickly
3. **Prioritize** the sources to onboard
4. **Present** simple and actionable recommendations","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","backgroundColor":"#0F1728"}},"modeNote":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### DSA++ classic mode
Without ES detected, the report remains usable and shows what the current telemetry would unlock in ES immediately.","fontColor":"#FDE68A","backgroundColor":"#1A2335"}},"metricNote":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**KPI reading**: separate what is activable in ES immediately from what still depends on collection.","fontColor":"#9FB0C7","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"synthesisNote":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Outcome**: leave with a finding, an ES value argument, quick wins, and a collection roadmap.","fontColor":"#C7D2FE","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"badgeObserved":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Observed now** Data really seen in telemetry","fontColor":"#BFDBFE","backgroundColor":"#10263A"}},"badgeProjected":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Projected with ES** Value calculated from data already present","fontColor":"#BBF7D0","backgroundColor":"#133127"}},"kpiInventory":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Observed data sources","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiInventory"},"options":{"majorColor":"#FFFFFF","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"kpiActivable":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Activable techniques","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiActivable"},"options":{"majorColor":"#67E8F9","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"kpiBlocked":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Techniques blocked by gaps","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiBlocked"},"options":{"majorColor":"#FDBA74","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"kpiMissingSources":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Key missing sources","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiMissingSources"},"options":{"majorColor":"#C4B5FD","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"kpiImmediateDetections":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Detections activable in ES","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiImmediateDetections"},"options":{"majorColor":"#34D399","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"kpiAdjacentCandidates":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Adjacent candidates","dataSources":{"primary":"dsKpiAdjacentCandidates"},"options":{"majorColor":"#FBBF24","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off"}},"assessmentFrame":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Reporting mode","dataSources":{"primary":"dsAssessmentFrame"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#1C3552","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":1}},"executiveStory":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Key readout messages","dataSources":{"primary":"dsExecutiveStory"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#1C3552","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":10}},"topActivations":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"What ES would unlock immediately","dataSources":{"primary":"dsTopActivations"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#17465A","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":10}},"topGaps":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"What collection would unlock next","dataSources":{"primary":"dsTopGaps"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#5B2130","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":10}},"auditIntro":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Audit**: this view justifies the finding, including in degraded DSA++ mode. It shows the framing, the readout messages, and the value distribution by family.","fontColor":"#C7D2FE","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"auditFindings":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Assessment findings","dataSources":{"primary":"dsAuditFindings"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#1C3552","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":10}},"potentialByFamily":{"type":"splunk.bar","title":"Quick wins par family","dataSources":{"primary":"dsPotentialByFamily"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","legendDisplay":"off","seriesColors":["#22D3EE"],"orientation":"horizontal"}},"gapsByFamily":{"type":"splunk.bar","title":"Collection priorities by family","dataSources":{"primary":"dsGapsByFamily"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","legendDisplay":"off","seriesColors":["#FB923C"],"orientation":"horizontal"}},"activationIntro":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Quick wins**: this view prepares a prioritization workshop or an ES sales conversation. It isolates the use cases the customer could push quickly with already visible telemetry.","fontColor":"#BFDBFE","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"activationMethod":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### How to use it
- Choose the highest-value **P1** items
- Validate underlying log quality
- Prepare a shortlist for a POC or workshop
- Give the customer a simple reading: "what can be activated now"","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","backgroundColor":"#0F1728"}},"potentialTable":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"What ES would enable quickly","dataSources":{"primary":"dsPotentialTable"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#17465A","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":50}},"collectionIntro":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Collection plan**: this view turns the DSA into an onboarding roadmap. It shows which sources to handle first and for what coverage value.","fontColor":"#FDE68A","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"collectionMethod":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### How to use it
- Prioritize by **coverage value**
- Link **source**, **TA**, and **use cases**
- Prepare the technical onboarding plan
- Provide a credible phased roadmap","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","backgroundColor":"#0F1728"}},"gapTable":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Prioritized collection backlog","dataSources":{"primary":"dsGapTable"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#5B2130","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":50}},"ingestIntro":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Dimensionnement** : cette vue montre l’ingestion journalière passée et aide à qualifier le profil de capacité des données.","fontColor":"#BFDBFE","backgroundColor":"transparent"}},"ingestMethod":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### Source de mesure
- Basé sur `index=_internal`
- `source=*license_usage.log`
- Agrégation par jour
- Histogramme et table en **GB/jour**
- KPI rapides en **MB/jour** pour une lecture plus visible","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","backgroundColor":"#0F1728"}},"ingestCaution":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"**Note** : il s’agit d’une lecture d’ingestion journalière historique utile pour le sizing. Ce n’est pas une mesure de stockage disque.","fontColor":"#FDE68A","backgroundColor":"#1A2335"}},"kpiIngestAvg":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Moyenne MB/jour","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestAvg"},"options":{"majorColor":"#FFFFFF","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off","precision":2}},"kpiIngestMedian":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Médiane MB/jour","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestMedian"},"options":{"majorColor":"#93C5FD","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off","precision":2}},"kpiIngestP95":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"P95 MB/jour","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestP95"},"options":{"majorColor":"#FBBF24","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off","precision":2}},"kpiIngestPeak":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Pic MB/jour","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestPeak"},"options":{"majorColor":"#F87171","backgroundColor":"#111C2F","sparklineDisplay":"off","precision":2}},"dailyIngestChart":{"type":"splunk.column","title":"Histogramme d’ingestion journalière","dataSources":{"primary":"dsDailyIngest"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"transparent","legendDisplay":"off","seriesColors":["#38BDF8"]}},"ingestStatsTable":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Analyse statistique d’ingestion","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestStats"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#1C3552","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":5}},"ingestPeakDays":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Jours de pic","dataSources":{"primary":"dsIngestPeakDays"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"#0F1728","headerBackgroundColor":"#1C3552","fontColor":"#E5EEF9","headerFontColor":"#FFFFFF","count":10}}},"layout":{"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_summary","label":"Summary"},{"layoutId":"layout_audit","label":"Audit"},{"layoutId":"layout_activation","label":"Quick wins"},{"layoutId":"layout_collection","label":"Collection plan"},{"layoutId":"layout_ingest","label":"Dimensionnement"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_summary":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1600,"height":1020,"backgroundColor":"#08111F"},"structure":[{"item":"bg","type":"block","position":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":1600,"h":1020}},{"item":"heroStrip","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":24,"w":8,"h":118}},{"item":"hero","type":"block","position":{"x":44,"y":28,"w":980,"h":86}},{"item":"heroNote","type":"block","position":{"x":44,"y":112,"w":880,"h":28}},{"item":"modeNote","type":"block","position":{"x":1050,"y":28,"w":526,"h":110}},{"item":"badgeObserved","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":150,"w":488,"h":24}},{"item":"badgeProjected","type":"block","position":{"x":528,"y":150,"w":992,"h":24}},{"item":"kpiInventory","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"kpiActivable","type":"block","position":{"x":276,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"kpiImmediateDetections","type":"block","position":{"x":528,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"kpiAdjacentCandidates","type":"block","position":{"x":780,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"kpiBlocked","type":"block","position":{"x":1032,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"kpiMissingSources","type":"block","position":{"x":1284,"y":180,"w":236,"h":102}},{"item":"metricNote","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":304,"w":1552,"h":42}},{"item":"synthesisNote","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":350,"w":1552,"h":28}},{"item":"assessmentFrame","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":394,"w":900,"h":150}},{"item":"dsaDefinition","type":"block","position":{"x":948,"y":394,"w":300,"h":150}},{"item":"dsaPrinciples","type":"block","position":{"x":1264,"y":394,"w":312,"h":150}},{"item":"executiveStory","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":566,"w":1552,"h":200}},{"item":"topActivations","type":"block","position":{"x":24,"y":790,"w":764,"h":196}},{"item":"topGaps","type":"block","position":{"x":812,"y":790,"w":764,"h":196}}]},"layout_audit":{"type":"absolute","options":{"widt
